title: EQ - Dialog for "i" button is present and can be closed
scenario: Verify that the EQ information dialog can be opened via the "i" icon next to the headline and dismissed by clicking anywhere on the screen.
steps: Start the app with an EQ-supporting device connected.
Open Device Settings and navigate to the EQ tab.
Check for the 'i' (information) icon next to the EQ headline.
Verify that a centered dialog appears over the EQ controls.
Verify the dialog contains the text: "Equalizer (EQ) enhances clarity by adjusting the frequency for your preferred sound signature. Changes affect music streaming, not telephony."
Click on the dialog or anywhere on the screen to close it.
expected: A centered dialog appears over the EQ controls with the specified informational text, and it can be closed by clicking on the dialog or anywhere on the screen.
